coverage_summary: Extensive concept coverage with strong page provenance, but severe duplication, inconsistent granularity, and missing page alignment for core unit concepts.

issues.issue: Duplicate concept 'Supervisor Pattern' with conflicting Korean/English definitions and disjointed source pages (e.g., [32,35] vs [41,42,43,45] vs [51,52,56]).
issues.suggested_fix: Merge all Supervisor Pattern entries into one unified concept with consolidated evidence and source pages [32,35,41,42,43,45,51,52,56].

issues.issue: Duplicate concept 'Prompt Specification' with identical definitions and overlapping source pages [29,30] and [34,35].
issues.suggested_fix: Merge into single 'Prompt Specification' concept with source pages [29,30,34,35] and unified evidence.

issues.issue: Duplicate concept 'State Definition' and 'State Flow' with overlapping content; 'State Definition' is redundant with 'State Management'.
issues.suggested_fix: Merge 'State Definition' and 'State Flow' into 'State Management' with source pages [11,19,20,27,34,35].

issues.issue: Duplicate concept 'Decision Policy' with identical definitions and overlapping source pages [11,20] and [34,35].
issues.suggested_fix: Merge into single 'Decision Policy' concept with source pages [11,20,34,35].

issues.issue: Concept 'LLMOps definition' and 'LLMOps focus areas' are semantically overlapping and lack clear distinction; both derive from page 10.
issues.suggested_fix: Merge into one concept: 'LLMOps Definition and Focus Areas' with evidence combining both and source pages [9,10].

issues.issue: Concept 'course objective' references page 5, but unit 'Overview' (01) has source_pages [1-6,11-...], implying page 5 should be covered — yet no other concept references it.
issues.suggested_fix: Either add more concepts derived from page 5 or remove 'course objective' if it's not a core concept; if retained, ensure it's not the only concept on page 5.

issues.issue: Concept 'DevOps analogy' cites page 8, but page 8 is not in unit 'Overview' source_pages list — inconsistency in unit boundary alignment.
issues.suggested_fix: Add page 8 to unit '01' source_pages or move 'DevOps analogy' to a later unit where page 8 is included.

issues.issue: Concept 'AI Interview Agent Goal' cites page 21, but page 21 is not in unit '01' source_pages — unit boundaries are violated.
issues.suggested_fix: Move 'AI Interview Agent Goal' to a new unit (e.g., 02) whose source_pages include 21–30, or add 21–30 to unit '01' if it's truly part of Overview.

issues.issue: Concept 'Waterfall visualization' has incomplete evidence (truncated text: 'which st').
issues.suggested_fix: Complete the evidence text: 'making it easy to see which steps consume the most time.'

issues.issue: Concept 'Agent system skills' has vague evidence: '[보조자료]Agent 시스템구축을위한 필요 기술들' — no concrete source text.
issues.suggested_fix: Replace vague evidence with direct quote or paraphrase from page 10, or remove if unsupported.
